rag_rules: Place component type contracts in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and named constants for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: Formulate guarantees as boolean expressions linking visible variables to valid ranges or relations
Ensure AGREE annex blocks use syntactically valid expressions with matching types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare helper variables with explicit bool type for range checks
Use valid AGREE syntax for guarantee declarations with named expressions
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in type-level contracts
